message:
fix(frankenterm-cell): gate std-dependent tests for no_std compilation (wa-3li8d)

Import alloc::{vec, format} macros in test module and add
#[cfg(feature = "std")] gates to 3 tests using eprintln! or
DefaultHasher. Fixes all 18 compilation errors when building
without std feature. Also remove unused core::hash::Hash import
in color.rs test.

Without std: 102 tests pass. With std: 105 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
